content.en:
Outside.

Some of the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters were also paying attention to what was happening in the Ultimate Demon Prison.

Those Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters in the Spirit Ancient Capital were also paying attention.

"You've killed enough ancient-level and high-level Ultimate Realm Lords, it's time to close the Ultimate Demon Hell!"

Gu Chen's Extreme Venerable suggested.

The other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords also nodded, according to the previous regulations, the time is indeed almost up now, if it is delayed any longer, it will undoubtedly let the outside world know that there is something wrong with the Ultimate Demon Prison.

So, it has to be closed.

......

"The Ultimate Hell is closing, it's time to get out!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His real body copy body quickly left the Ultimate Hell, but the Ultimate Demon Disciple Copy Body is still here, there is no need to rush out, his copy body can continue to explore the Ultimate Hell.

"023" boom and boom!!!

An Ancient Rank and Hao Rank Ultimate Realm Lord came out, but the number was much, much less than in the past.

"So many ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords and Hao-level Ultimate Realm Lords have died!"

Ye Tian was full of emotion.

You must know that every Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lord is an incomparably top-notch existence, and in a territory of the Ultimate Land, it is a Dominant-level existence, but now so many have died at once.

Of course.

The surviving Gu-level Ultimate Realm Masters didn't care, because they had obtained enough resources and even opportunities, and their strength would increase a lot in the following years.

Moreover, they have not fallen, so naturally they are not worried about anything.

Soon, these ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters and Hao-level Ultimate Realm Masters left one after another.

Ye Tian also returned to the Spirit Ancient Capital, but this time many Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters in the Spirit Ancient Capital also fell, including some Ancient Level powerhouses that Ye Tian knew.

This trip to the Ultimate Hell, he gained a lot, and obtained a lot of resources, among which there is more than one treasure that can assist in the comprehension of the ultimate rules, and there are also many materials that can refine the ultimate weapon.

There is also the Ultimate Hell Stone, which he has also obtained quite a few.

At this time.

He was using the Ultimate Hell Stone to refine the substance that could strengthen and refine the ultimate will, gradually refining some, and then swallowing and refining his ultimate will.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's ultimate will was constantly refined, and the improvement was very fast.

"What a fast refining efficiency!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

In the past, it was extremely difficult for him to refine the Ultimate Will, and only after the strength of his physical body could he incidentally improve the Ultimate Will.

At present, the strength of his ultimate will is also the degree of the first transformation, and if he wants to complete the second transformation, it is estimated that it will take infinite years to do it.

However, the Ultimate Hell Stone can allow him to quickly refine the ultimate will, which shows the importance of resources.

"No wonder countless strong people are pouring into the ultimate demon hell, even at the cost of extinction!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After that, he used the substances refined from these Ultimate Hell Stones to frantically temper his ultimate will.

this day.

Ye Tian's ultimate will finally completed the second transformation.

Rumble!!!!

The ultimate will is transformed, and his aura is also increasing, allowing the ultimate body to exert more terrifying strength.

"Very good, this is the second Ultimate Will Transformation, when I use up all the Ultimate Demon Hellstones, I should be able to reach the level of three or four Ultimate Will Transformations!" Ye Tian said darkly.

In addition to these Ultimate Hell Stones, he has also obtained some treasures that can help comprehend the ultimate rules, and he is also comprehending and improving the ultimate rules.

this day.

Ye Tian's Ultimate Demon Disciple copied his body and comprehended the ultimate rules of the eternal night in a treasure place in the Ultimate Demon Prison.

At this point, he now has four ultimate rules: the Extreme Day Ultimate Rule, the Darkest Ultimate Rule, the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule, and the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule.

After that, he perfected the Eternal Night Abyss Knife, the ultimate dimensional killing move, turning it into a true ultimate killing move.

The ultimate hell.

Ye Tian gradually comprehended the ultimate system of the Demon Prison, which was still a system that had never been comprehended by the strong, because those strong people did not dare to stay here for too long, otherwise they would be transformed into the ultimate demon.

Therefore, this has led to the fact that no Ultimate Realm Master has comprehended the Ultimate Demon Hell's Ultimate System in the Ultimate Demon Prison.

However, Ye Tian's ultimate demon disciple copy body can stay here to comprehend the ultimate system of demon hell.

After that, he would occasionally copy a real body to help the real body copy body on the path of the Demon Hell Ultimate System.

0......... on this day

Ye Tian reached the Ultimate Realm Master Realm on the path of the Demon Hell Ultimate System, that is, the soldier-level Ultimate Realm Master, and then continued to cultivate and comprehend the ultimate rules of the Demon Hell.

In addition, there are many treasures in the Ultimate Demon Hell that can assist in the comprehension of the ultimate rules, and it is even easier to comprehend the ultimate rules.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's Demon Hell Ultimate Rule to reach three hundred and sixty-five levels, and then he created the Demon Hell Ultimate Body.

Another long time has passed.

Ye Tian not only practiced the ultimate body of the Demon Hell, but also comprehended the ultimate rules of the Demon Hell.

At this time, Ye Tian found that the ultimate rules of the Demon Hell were easier to comprehend, and the Ultimate Demon Hell was too suitable for comprehending the ultimate rules of the Demon Hell .

The ultimate rule of a hell of demons!

The ultimate rule of the double hell!

Triple Inferno Ultimate Rules!

The Hell's Ultimate Rule is the latecomer, surpassing the other four Ultimate Rules.

You must know that Ye Tian is currently at the highest realm of the Extreme Day Ultimate Rule, that is, the five-fold ultimate rule, but the Demon Hell Ultimate Rule will soon reach the six-fold ultimate rule.

With such an efficiency, it is definitely easy to rise to the realm of the ultimate rule of counting.

And at the same time.

All over the Ultimate Land are slaughtered for some resources, and there are even forces often fighting, which makes the entire Ultimate Land chaotic.

Occasionally, there would even be an Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord fighting, but this was still very rare. 3.9

Ye Tian was very low-key during this time, because he still had the treasure land of the Ultimate Demon Prison that had been supplying him to improve his strength, and he had not yet digested the treasure land of the Ultimate Demon Prison, so there was no need to rush to compete for other opportunities.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of years of the Ultimate Era have passed.

Ye Tian obviously sensed that something was wrong with the atmosphere in the Ultimate Land.

Linggu Capital.

Gu Chen, the Extreme Venerable, and they met again.

At the meeting, Gu Chenji said: "Everyone, through our efforts, many ancient level Ultimate Realm Masters and Hao-level Ultimate Realm Masters have been killed, and many of them have fallen, but there are already many Ancient Level Ultimate Realm Masters who have learned a little bit about the situation, and they are not willing to compete for the opportunity at present." According to this efficiency, it can only delay the arrival of the ultimate calamity, but cannot completely prevent it. If the ultimate catastrophe really comes, we will also be affected, and we will have to find a new way!"
